expectations.text: Tri-driver pattern: auto-detects Neon serverless vs Neon HTTP vs local pg based on URL and NEXT_RUNTIME
expectations.evidence: postgresClient.ts lines 18-30: checks POSTGRES_URL.includes('neondb'), then branches on isNextRuntime (NEXT_RUNTIME) for drizzleNeon vs drizzleNeonHttp, else uses node-postgres Pool

expectations.text: Lazy proxy pattern: db instance doesn't eagerly connect on import
expectations.evidence: postgresClient.ts lines 43-54: const dbProxy = new Proxy({}, { get: (_, prop) => { ... const db = getDb(); ... }}) -- getDb() only called on property access, not on import

expectations.text: casing snake_case: set in BOTH drizzle.config.ts AND client initialization
expectations.evidence: drizzle.config.ts line 13: casing: "snake_case". postgresClient.ts lines 21, 24, 29: all three drizzle() calls include casing: "snake_case"

expectations.text: Files at services/database/ path: SE-2 convention
expectations.evidence: All database files under packages/nextjs/services/database/ -- config/postgresClient.ts, config/schema.ts, repositories/users.ts, seed.ts, wipe.ts

expectations.text: Root proxy scripts for drizzle-kit commands (db:seed, db:wipe, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Root package.json lines 52-54: drizzle-kit, db:seed, db:wipe scripts all present

expectations.text: Docker Compose for local PostgreSQL development
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml at project root: postgres:16 image, port 5432, volume ./data/db
packages/nextjs/.env.development exists with POSTGRES_URL. drizzle.config.ts line 4: dotenv.config({ path: ".env.development" })
postgresClient.ts line 8: export const PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME. seed.ts and wipe.ts check POSTGRES_URL?.includes(PRODUCTION_DATABASE_HOSTNAME) and exit

expectations.text: All required dependencies: drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, pg, dotenv, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, @types/pg, tsx
expectations.evidence: packages/nextjs/package.json: @neondatabase/serverless, dotenv, drizzle-orm, pg in deps; @types/pg, drizzle-kit, drizzle-seed, tsx in devDeps
